title: Your Delivery Apps Charge a Secret $3,100/Year Tax
hook: You think you're paying for food — but delivery apps buried a $3,100 annual fee inside every order, and most people never do the math.
angle: Reframes convenience spending not as a luxury but as a recurring hidden subscription — then hits with the 30-year compounding cost to make it visceral.
audience: Millennials and Gen Z who use delivery apps regularly and underestimate the true annual cost vs. what they could invest.
key_numbers: $12–$18 in hidden fees per delivery order
